## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring Manager Interview for Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX operates on an agency services model, delivering AI-powered organic blog content](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [The Technical Managing Editor role involves project management, editorial work, and improving AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Naj has extensive content management experience across various industries and is seeking a role with learning opportunities and multiple client exposure](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [GrowthX is focused on building leverage and efficiency as they scale, with an emphasis on refining AI processes and client onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Operating Model and Role Overview

  - [Agency services model focusing on organic blog content](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [AI-powered content generation using internal platform](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Managing Editor role involves:](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
      - [Project management for 3-5 clients](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
      - [Editorial work and content quality assurance](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
      - [Improving AI workflows and prompts](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
      - [Some client-facing responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [Team structure: Content Managers → Managing Editors → Directors/Account Strategists](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)

### Naj's Background and Experience

  - [Extensive content management experience since high school](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Progressed from individual contributor to team lead roles](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Notable positions:](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
      - [Cloudways: Led content teams for e-commerce, agencies, and developers](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [VPN Overview: Content and SEO coordination](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
      - [Directive: SEO strategist managing 5 B2B SaaS clients](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
      - [Current: Content Marketing Manager at COM100](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Strong focus on SEO, content strategy, and team management](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)

### AI and Automation Experience

  - [Current tech stack: SEMrush, Profound, Scrunched, Phrase, Surfer SEO](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
  - [Trained custom bot on Claude for company's brand voice](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
  - [Challenges with AI:](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
      - [Repetitive errors due to vague instructions](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
      - [Difficulty with highly technical or analytical content](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
      - [Issues with referencing competitor content](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)

### Content Strategy Adaptation

  - [Example from Directive: Shifted from top-of-funnel to bottom-of-funnel strategy](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Focused on creating "alternatives" content for client (Airbase)](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [Resulted in 147% increase in conversions over 2-3 months](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)

### GrowthX Client Onboarding and Retention

  - [Refined onboarding process after rapid scaling earlier in the year](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
  - [Current process:](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
      - [8-week strategy sprint before long-term engagement](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
      - [Artifact refinement and calibration](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
      - [2-3 weeks of content delivery for further calibration](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [High retention rate: only one client not converting in 5 months](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [Limiting new client onboarding to two per week for quality assurance](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to continue refining AI workflows and prompts](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
  - [Focus on building leverage and efficiency in content production](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
  - [Potential hire to contribute to improving AI processes and scalability](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
  - [Follow up with Naj regarding next steps in the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/aR_xuLy32UpBRUnz1tSw-QuTsaSW_oKd?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
